item.title: ID Cards Maker [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: ID Cards Maker [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: printableidcard1
item.itunes:summary:
ID Cards Maker
(Office Apps)
ID Cards Maker tool crafts employee ID badges. Amazing ID Cards Maker program designs many kinds of scholar identity cards. Visit company URL www.printableidcardsmaker.com and easily download miraculous ID Cards Maker software that is used to make professional identity cards in just few mice of clicks. Wonderful employee identity badges maker tool allows user to print created ID cards in many categories of shapes as rectangle, ellipse, star etc. For installing astonishing ID Cards Maker application click on website www.printableidcardsmaker.com which is used to design many kinds of colorful identification cards for employees, students, security guard and other people.

[read more]

item.itunes:author: printableidcard1
item.itunes:summary:
ID Card Maker Downloads
(Office Apps)
ID Card Maker Downloads crafts employee cards.ID Card Maker Downloads program creates wonderful, eye-catching student's cards. Simple to use ID Card Maker Downloads Software facilities to create premium qualities customized school students ID cards in simple mouse clicks. Cost effective Card Maker software designs variety of staff member’s cards in multiple shape and size. Technically advance ID Card Maker Downloads Software crafts professional identification cards crafting with using series generating options. Simple to use Card Maker utility generates wonderful printable school student cards, staff members and employees ID card in less time and affords. ID Card Maker Downloads application facilitates to create customized ID cards including text, images, logo, color, backgrounds according to personal needs.

item.title: Printable Greeting Cards Maker Software [Office Apps]

item.itunes:author: printableidcard1
item.itunes:summary:
Printable Greeting Cards Maker Software
(Office Apps)
Advance festival card producing application. Printable Greeting Cards Maker Software prints stunning anniversary cards. Want to create stunning celebration cards in few mouse clicks? If yes, then use cost effective Printable Greeting Cards Maker Software that provides facility to develop handmade festival cards in perfect manner. Outstanding Printable Greeting Cards Maker Software recommends user friendly interface to craft eye-catching Christmas cards in convenient way. Specialized invitation card crafter program provides comprehensive way to develop attractive thanksgiving cards in various shapes including rectangle, ellipse and rounded rectangle.

item.title: Click Radio [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Click Radio [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
Click Radio
(Audioplayers)
Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app
project of mine as to be very easy to use.
Click and play features:
* Music radio streamer
* Streamripper recorder
* Plays local music files
* Creates a music playlist
* Youtube media downloader

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]

Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app
project of mine as to be very easy to use.

* Music radio streamer
* Streamripper recorder

* Creates a music playlist
* Youtube media downloader

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

item.title: Mustang Terminal [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:title: Mustang Terminal [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Mustang Terminal
(Terminal Apps)
claudemods-qt6terminal v2.0.14

v2.0.15
since torpedo is my system for alpine
and this wont work on alpine
so im changing it to Mustang Terminal
ive tested it and commands work on all systems
ive updated the text shown also
it will ask for sudo upon opening the app
updated photos provided also

v2.0.14
renamed to Torpedo Terminal
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
package and update commands now work
removed execute button and changed to reset
watch my video showcasing the terminal on youtube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ymLpQvtcU5I

v2.0.12 update new functions are
new appimage of my qt6 terminal
1: alot of improvements for commands
to make it univeral to arch debian and ubuntu and dnf
2 : new way of changing themes
3: delete pacman .lck button
4: automatic push enter for commads to execute

bash history is broken i will fix this in next update
i may make the .lck feature universal in next update
all has been test and works otherwise

5 named themes to choose from check photos
[read more]
item.description:
Mustang Terminal
(Terminal Apps)
claudemods-qt6terminal v2.0.14

v2.0.15
since torpedo is my system for alpine
and this wont work on alpine
so im changing it to Mustang Terminal
ive tested it and commands work on all systems
ive updated the text shown also
it will ask for sudo upon opening the app
updated photos provided also

v2.0.14
renamed to Torpedo Terminal
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
package and update commands now work
removed execute button and changed to reset
watch my video showcasing the terminal on youtube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ymLpQvtcU5I

v2.0.12 update new functions are
new appimage of my qt6 terminal
1: alot of improvements for commands
to make it univeral to arch debian and ubuntu and dnf
2 : new way of changing themes
3: delete pacman .lck button
4: automatic push enter for commads to execute

bash history is broken i will fix this in next update
i may make the .lck feature universal in next update
all has been test and works otherwise

5 named themes to choose from check photos
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Mustang Terminal
(Terminal Apps)
claudemods-qt6terminal v2.0.14

v2.0.15
since torpedo is my system for alpine
and this wont work on alpine
so im changing it to Mustang Terminal
ive tested it and commands work on all systems
ive updated the text shown also
it will ask for sudo upon opening the app
updated photos provided also

v2.0.14
renamed to Torpedo Terminal
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
package and update commands now work
removed execute button and changed to reset
watch my video showcasing the terminal on youtube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ymLpQvtcU5I

v2.0.12 update new functions are
new appimage of my qt6 terminal
1: alot of improvements for commands
to make it univeral to arch debian and ubuntu and dnf
2 : new way of changing themes
3: delete pacman .lck button
4: automatic push enter for commads to execute

bash history is broken i will fix this in next update
i may make the .lck feature universal in next update
all has been test and works otherwise

5 named themes to choose from check photos
[read more]

item.title: Order ID Cards Make [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Order ID Cards Make [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: printableidcard1
item.itunes:summary:
Order ID Cards Make
(Office Apps)
Make employee identity cards with unique data. Generate student badges of various colors using Order ID Cards Maker tool. How to make multiple student badges? Just download Order ID Cards Maker software from company www.printableidcardsmaker.com website and use inbuilt creative tool. Student card creator application generates and modifies cards with customized ID cards. Advanced Order ID Cards Maker application available at company www.printableidcardsmaker.com site makes business cards without taking any expert advice. Software offers inbuilt creative objects as line, pencils, ellipse, etc while adding images and pictures to badges.

[read more]

item.title: Wedding Invitation Card Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Wedding Invitation Card Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: printableidcard1
item.itunes:summary:
Wedding Invitation Card Software
(Office Apps)
Tool makes printable wedding invitation cards. For developing stunning marriage cards via Wedding Invitation Card Software. Affordable Wedding Invitation Card Software creates versatile marriage cards in simplified way. Maker utility for wedding cards easily generates great looking wedding cards in cost-efficient manner. Outstanding Wedding Invitation Card Software provides simple steps to design colorful wedding invitation cards in comprehensive manner. Cost effective Marriage card designing application gives extraordinary facility to craft and print bulk number of wedding cards in few countable mouse clicks. Marriage invitation card creator utility generates professional looking stunning wedding wishing cards without any prior technical knowledge. Award winning Wedding Invitation Card Software empowers technical user to create colorful marriage invitation cards according to user’s choice. Best wedding card making program is used for crafting beautiful marriage cards using image designing objects like line, pencil, text, color, rectangle, ellipse etc.

item.title: Printable Greeting Cards Maker [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Printable Greeting Cards Maker [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: printableidcard1
item.itunes:summary:
Printable Greeting Cards Maker
(Office Apps)
New Year occasion card maker tool. Printable Greeting Cards Maker program develops colorful invitation cards. Now download Printable Greeting Cards Maker software on your Windows PC that provides you best way to develop birthday wishes and invitation cards in multiple patterns which suits you best. Printable Greeting Cards Maker application easily designs greeting cards in different pattern which suits your business needs and patterns. Greeting card making tool supports Windows operating system for developing invitation cards in your pattern using designing tools like pencil, text, color etc. Would you like to generate interactive and colorful interactive wedding invitations and other occasion cards, and then start using Printable Greeting Cards Maker program on your Windows PC that helps to design with the help of different designing tools like pencil, text, circle, rectangle etc. without any need o applying programming skills. Generate cards program consists of printing settings used to print them on single sheet of paper for future use.

[read more]
